stories.headline: Role Reversal: Tamil Nadu's Triumphs, Trends & Turmoils If Tamil Nadu politics before the nineties often resembled a game of snakes and ladders played under Delhi’s shadow, the decade after 1991 altered the board
stories.summary: Tamil Nadu's political landscape underwent significant changes after 1991. Prior to the 1990s, the state's politics was heavily influenced by Delhi. The Anti Hindi Imposition Movement brought together Tamil Nationalist organizations and Dravidian parties to protect and promote Tamil. However, the relevance of Tamil Nationalist Parties decreased over time. The Sri Lankan civil war led to the emergence of small Tamil militant groups in India. The AIADMK, led by Jayalalithaa, reunited in 1989 after contesting the 1989 elections as separate factions. Notably, five out of seven chief ministers from Dravidian parties had connections to Tamil cinema, including M. G. Ramachandran and J. Jayalalithaa, who leveraged their film careers to rise to power. These developments have shaped the state's politics, marking a shift away from Delhi's influence.

stories.headline: No other headlines were provided to select from, therefore only one headline is returned.
stories.summary: NPR provides comprehensive coverage of national and world news, including politics, business, science, and technology. The outlet offers audio and podcasts, as well as extended coverage of major events. AllSides brings balanced news with bias analysis, presenting top stories from left, center, and right perspectives. Al Jazeera delivers fact-based news, videos, and photos, while NDTV.com offers the latest international and world news, breaking stories, and global current events. These sources provide up-to-date information on current affairs, politics, and news specials around the clock. With a range of trusted online sources, readers can stay informed about the latest developments and top news stories of the day, including breaking news and special coverage from around the world.

stories.headline: Stock Market Today March 30, 2026: Sensex tanks 1,191 points, Nifty50 Fall To 22,470 Indian equities on Dalal Street saw volatility as global market trends and fresh tariff concerns linked to Donald Trump impacted investor sentiment.
stories.summary: Indian equity markets ended the 2025-26 financial year on a weak note, with the Sensex tanking 1,191 points and the Nifty50 falling to 22,470. The decline was driven by global market trends, fresh tariff concerns linked to Donald Trump, and rising oil prices. The Indian stock market witnessed a gap-down opening on Monday, March 30, following a slump in global markets. The rupee also hit record lows, adding to the downward pressure. The benchmark BSE Sensex settled lower, while the NSE Nifty50 showed a minor rebound after previous losses. The market volatility was fueled by ongoing global tensions, RBI action, and investor sentiment. The Indian equity markets ended the final trading session of the financial year with losses of over 2%. The decline reflects the impact of global events on the Indian stock market.

stories.headline: Stock market today (March 30, 2026): Which are the top gainers and losers in Nifty50 and BSE Sensex today? Check list India Business News: Equity benchmark indices Sensex and Nifty ended the last trading session of the 2025-26 financial year sharply lower on Monday, as the ongo
stories.summary: Equity benchmark indices Sensex and Nifty ended the last trading session of the 2025-26 financial year sharply lower on Monday. The BSE Sensex closed at 75,273.45. Top gainers in Nifty50 included Shriram Finance. The ongoing war and AI advances are creating winners and losers among transport stocks. The stock market will reopen on April 1, 2026, after a brief closure. Investors can track live index dynamics and market data on various financial platforms. The list of companies and market data for BSE Sensex is available, providing past performance, valuation, and other relevant information. The S&P BSE Sensex index chart can be viewed to track the latest index dynamics, along with forecasts and market news. The stock market's performance is being closely monitored, with investors looking for opportunities and managing their financial portfolios accordingly.

stories.headline: GIFT Nifty jumps 240 points on Trump's reported plans to end Iran war. Sensex, Nifty to see some relief tomorrow? Indian stock markets are poised for a potential rebound tomorrow following a significant sell-off, buoyed by positive signals from GIFT Nifty and declining oil
stories.summary: GIFT Nifty jumped 240 points to trade at 22,672, following reports of Trump's plans to end the Iran war. This surge is expected to bring relief to the Indian stock markets, which have been experiencing a significant sell-off. The Indian markets, including the Sensex and Nifty 50, are poised for a potential rebound tomorrow. The decline in oil prices has also contributed to the positive outlook. The Indian stock markets are currently closed, but the GIFT Nifty's gain is a promising sign for the future. The Sensex, India's benchmark index, had recently hit a record high due to rapid economic growth and increased foreign investment, and the market is expected to continue this trend with the easing of global tensions. Tomorrow's market opening is anticipated to be positive, driven by these favorable factors.

stories.headline: Volatile ride for stocks, bullion sees big bets - The Times of India India Business News: MUMBAI: A year that started with volatility with the US President Donald Trump’s liberation day announcement that left global investors jit
stories.summary: Global stock markets experienced a volatile year, starting with US President Donald Trump's "Liberation Day" announcement, which left investors jittery. The introduction of new tariff policies in April 2025 led to a crash in global markets. Later, a pause on these tariffs sparked a 9.5% jump in the S&P 500. Indian equity markets also witnessed volatile sessions, with benchmark indices BSE Sensex and Nifty 50 oscillating between gains and losses. The markets reflected mixed cues from global markets, with cautious investor sentiment amid persistent global risks, including the war in West Asia. Experts advise against selling, suggesting it's a time to buy in small parts, deploying capital gradually over the next few months. The volatile ride for stocks has been accompanied by big bets on bullion, as investors seek safe-haven assets amid global tensions.

stories.headline: Nvidia’s Jensen Huang says ‘we’ve achieved AGI.’ But no one can agree on what that means Why the most important term in tech remains hotly debated.
stories.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang recently stated that artificial general intelligence (AGI) has already been achieved in a conversation with podcaster Lex Fridman. However, this claim has sparked debate, as recent research suggests that AGI has not been achieved and proposes new methods for measuring it. The definition of AGI remains unclear, leading to differing opinions on whether it has been attained. Huang's statement has garnered attention, with some analyzing its implications for Nvidia's stock. The CEO also discussed the advancements in AI, where systems are designing and improving themselves, leading to rapid progress. The lack of a clear definition for AGI has led to ongoing discussions and disagreements within the tech community. Researchers and experts continue to explore and refine the concept of AGI, seeking to establish a consensus on its meaning and criteria.

stories.headline: Google Unveils New AI Model Capable of Learning and Adapting at Unprecedented Speeds
stories.summary: Google has unveiled a new AI model, Gemini 3 Deep Think, which demonstrates unprecedented learning and adaptation speeds. In testing, the model outperformed its predecessor, Gemini 3 Pro, on various benchmarks, including Humanity's Last Exam (41.0%) and GPQA Diamond (93.8%). Notably, it achieved 45.1% on ARC-AGI-2, a significant improvement. This development builds upon previous releases, such as Gemini 3.1 Pro, which showed more than double the reasoning performance of its predecessor. Google's AI advancements also include Genie 3, a general-purpose world model that generates interactive environments, and AlphaFold 2, which solved the protein structure prediction problem five years ago. These breakthroughs showcase Google's progress in AI and machine learning, with potential applications in advancing science and improving disease treatment. The new model's capabilities highlight the rapid progress being made in AI research and development.

stories.headline: Elon Musk Warns of Existential Risk Posed by Unregulated Development of Artificial General Intelligence
stories.summary: Elon Musk has warned of the existential risk posed by the unregulated development of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). AGI is a theoretical type of artificial intelligence that matches or surpasses human capabilities across virtually all cognitive tasks. Musk emphasized the need for precautionary and proactive government intervention, stating that reactive regulation would be too late. He shared similar concerns with the late physicist Stephen Hawking, who warned about an AI apocalypse. Musk's warning highlights the potential risks of AI, citing competence rather than malice as the primary concern. This warning comes as Musk's company SpaceX is preparing to file for an initial public offering (IPO) with regulators, potentially as soon as this week. Musk's views on AI regulation have sparked debate, with some experts agreeing that AI poses an existential threat to humanity.

stories.headline: Microsoft Announces Breakthrough in Machine Learning with New Algorithm That Surpasses Human Performance in Complex Tasks
stories.summary: Microsoft has announced a breakthrough in machine learning with a new algorithm that surpasses human performance in complex tasks. This achievement is a significant milestone in the field of artificial intelligence, enabling self-learning algorithms to perform tasks without explicit instructions. The new algorithm can learn from data and generalize to unseen data, leading to more efficient and accurate automated systems. Microsoft's Copilot research assistant has been upgraded with a multi-model approach, combining OpenAI's GPT and Anthropic's Claude. The models are designed to use no more than 5X the steps a human would use, with a higher weight given to later levels. This breakthrough has the potential to reduce human error and enhance productivity, and is expected to be a major advancement in the field of machine learning. The benchmark for this achievement was designed to detect continual learning breakthroughs.
